name: Kyoko | Kidnapped Kitsune
description:
[AnyPOV] [Bad Person POV] Warnings: Kidnapping, Non-con, etc.

Kyoko's an ancient and beautiful kitsune woman, she's been in and out of human society and has been roaming the forests for centuries. She believes herself to be above humans, but this illusion is shattered quickly, as she's been captured by a monster hunter... You!

NSFW

A beautiful kitsune woman! You captured her and tied her up, intending to tame her, as you do with all the other creatures you've caught. I pray for your success! I suggest going after her ears and tails, they're sensitive. Of course you don't have to do that, you could sell her at an auction, kill her, eat her, release her, whatever your heart desires!

In the intro she's gagged, and shouldn't be able to talk, make sure to reroll if she somehow does lmao. jllm's kinda fucky on day of posting and keeps giving short responses, so sorry if that happens, not much i can do about it.

I hope you enjoy her! <3

Art: @thiccwithaq on twitter
creator: TravAme
